name: Mung Dal with Black Mustard Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mung beans.
2. Place them with turmeric and ginger in a large pot.
3. Add 4 cups water and bring to a boil, stirring often.
4. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, partially covered, for 30 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and beat with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. When ready to serve, heat the puree until piping hot.
7. Stir in lemon juice and salt.
8. Heat ghee over high heat in a small frying pan.
9. When very hot, carefully add the mustard seeds and fry until they start to turn grey.
10. Continue stirring rapidly for a moment; then turn off the heat.
11. Pour the hot ghee mixture over the dal and fold in the chopped coriander.
This dal is excellent with almost every vegetable.
